summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AME is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $231.06. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 36.8%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $237.72 and a significant trendline confluence around $236.34 (formed by 4 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
